section.title: Project Galaxy
section.description: A visual map of Gautam's project universe, shared engineering domains, and progression toward complete AI products.

labels.evolutionDescription: Each system added a new layer of technical judgment, moving from focused classification toward connected AI product architecture.

projects.name: AI Plant Disease Detection
projects.description: An image-classification workflow that identifies likely plant diseases and pairs model output with practical care guidance.
achievements: Connected model output to practical user guidance
Established the first end-to-end classification pattern
projects.architecture: Image intake flows through preprocessing and TensorFlow classification before a FastAPI layer returns diagnosis confidence and guidance to a React interface.
projects.roadmap: Expand training data, formalize model evaluation, and add reviewed diagnosis history.

projects.name: Wildlife Conservation & Species Identification
projects.description: A research-oriented species identification system for confidence-ranked wildlife observations and conservation review.
achievements: Made model confidence legible to non-technical users
Extended classification into a mission-driven domain
projects.architecture: Field images pass through preprocessing and a vision model, then confidence-ranked species results and observation metadata are prepared for human review.
projects.roadmap: Grow the species dataset, improve difficult-image handling, and add observation analytics.

projects.name: AI Meeting & Lecture Note Taker
projects.description: A speech intelligence system that converts long meetings and lectures into searchable transcripts, summaries, and action items.
achievements: Connected frontend, backend, storage, and model orchestration
projects.architecture: Audio capture feeds a transcription layer, an AI summary engine, structured note storage, and a typed review interface.
projects.roadmap: Add retrieval, evaluation, speaker-aware notes, and collaborative review workflows.

projects.name: CrowdScope Crowd Monitoring System
projects.description: An operational monitoring concept that turns crowd inputs into zone-based density signals and dashboard intelligence.
achievements: Connected ingestion, metrics, and dashboard concerns
projects.architecture: Sensor or camera inputs enter an API and AI processing layer before zone metrics are stored and surfaced through an operator dashboard.
projects.roadmap: Introduce simulation data, privacy boundaries, event streaming, and threshold-based alerts.

relationships.label: Evolution from model output to complete AI workflows
Shared frontend, API, storage, and product architecture
Vision signals expanded toward monitoring systems
Observation data connected to operational analytics

evolution.contribution: Learned image preprocessing, confidence-aware results, and model-to-interface delivery.
Added human review, field variability, metadata, and mission-driven AI judgment.
Combined model services, persistent data, typed interfaces, and traceable AI output.
Extended AI thinking into ingestion, operational metrics, privacy, and monitoring architecture.
